0.2)\n","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","table",null,{"children":[["$","thead",null,{"children":["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","th",null,{"children":"Signal"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Weight"}],["$","th",null,{"children":"Description"}]]}]}],["$","tbody",null,{"children":[["$","tr",null,{"children":[["$","td",null,{"children":"Vector temporal_weight=0.1,\n)","language":"python"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Consolidation Pipeline"}],"\n",["$","$L3",null,{"chart":"\nflowchart TD\n  WM[Working Memory] -->|candidate| S{Scoring}\n  S -->|importance > 0.7| C[Compress with AAAK]\n  S -->|importance < 0.3| E[Evict]\n  C -->|store| EM[Episodic Memory]\n  C -->|extract| SM[Semantic Memory]\n"}],"\n",["$","h2",null,{"children":"Session Grouping"}],"\n",["$","p",null,{"children":"Episodic entries can be grouped by session for chronological recall:"}],"\n",["$","$L2",null,{"code":"# Store with session\nmem.remember(\n  content=\"User approved the design mockup.\",\n  session_id=\"design-review-2026-04-25\",\n  tags=[\"design\", \"approval\"],\n)\n\n# Recall entire session\nsession =
